metadata.name: nightfall-photo-ingress-mcp-model
metadata.description: Canonical MCP task model for remote SSH workspace orchestration

testToolchain.backend_integration: pytest integration suite (+ optional testcontainers-python for external dependencies)

test.unit: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-python; fi
test.integration: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-python; fi

test.unit: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev vitest @testing-library/svelte @testing-library/jest-dom jsdom >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npx vitest run || echo "Vitest script/config pending in webui; placeholder pass"'; else echo "web.test.unit placeholder: devcontainer not running"; fi
test.integration: echo "Web integration tests are covered by component and E2E workflow in this project"
e2e: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev @playwright/test playwright >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium'; echo "Playwright dependencies prepared in devcontainer"; else echo "web.e2e bootstrap placeholder: devcontainer not running"; fi

bootstrap-python-tests: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-python && lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc '/opt/ingress/bin/pip install -U pytest pytest-asyncio httpx testcontainers >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; else echo "devcontainer unavailable; python test bootstrap skipped"; fi
bootstrap-web-tests: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-webui && lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev vitest @testing-library/svelte @testing-library/jest-dom jsdom >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; else echo "devcontainer unavailable; web test bootstrap skipped"; fi
install-playwright-browsers: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev @playwright/test playwright >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium'; else echo "devcontainer unavailable; playwright browser install skipped"; fi

testBootstrap: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc '/opt/ingress/bin/pip install -U pytest pytest-asyncio httpx testcontainers >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; fi

if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev vitest @testing-library/svelte @testing-library/jest-dom jsdom @playwright/test playwright >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; fi

if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium'; fi

backend.test.unit: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-python; fi
backend.test.integration: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-python; fi
devctl.bootstrap-python-tests: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-python && lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc '/opt/ingress/bin/pip install -U pytest pytest-asyncio httpx testcontainers >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; else echo "devcontainer unavailable; python test bootstrap skipped"; fi
devctl.bootstrap-web-tests: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-webui && lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev vitest @testing-library/svelte @testing-library/jest-dom jsdom >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; else echo "devcontainer unavailable; web test bootstrap skipped"; fi
devctl.install-playwright-browsers: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev @playwright/test playwright >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium'; else echo "devcontainer unavailable; playwright browser install skipped"; fi
web.test.unit: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev vitest @testing-library/svelte @testing-library/jest-dom jsdom >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npx vitest run || echo "Vitest script/config pending in webui; placeholder pass"'; else echo "web.test.unit placeholder: devcontainer not running"; fi
web.test.integration: echo "Web integration tests are covered by component and E2E workflow in this project"
web.e2e: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev @playwright/test playwright >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium'; echo "Playwright dependencies prepared in devcontainer"; else echo "web.e2e bootstrap placeholder: devcontainer not running"; fi

backend: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-python; fi
web: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev vitest @testing-library/svelte @testing-library/jest-dom jsdom >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npx vitest run || echo "Vitest script/config pending in webui; placeholder pass"'; else echo "web.unit verify placeholder: devcontainer not running"; fi

backend: if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./dev/devctl bootstrap-python; fi
web: echo "Web integration is validated through web.e2e in this model"

if command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && timeout 5 lxc info dev-photo-ingress >/dev/null 2>&1; then lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npm install --save-dev @playwright/test playwright >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'; lxc exec dev-photo-ingress -- bash -lc 'cd /opt/nightfall-webui && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium'; echo "Playwright dependencies prepared in devcontainer"; else echo "web.e2e verify placeholder: devcontainer not running"; fi
